scope_validation.rationale: History analysis, AI comparison, and review UI are one operator workflow. Split backend vs UI deferred.

acceptance_criteria_summary: AC-1: History aggregation per account, dominant category share (≥80% threshold)
AC-2: History suggestion with confidence = dominant share
AC-3: AI classification still runs with confidence
AC-4: Disagreement → pending review queue (no Firefly write until Accept)
AC-5: UI panel with transaction summary, history/AI categories + confidence, Accept/Reject
AC-6: Accept applies category + optional tag; Reject dismisses
AC-7: Hard account mappings (DEC-0001 step 1) and auto-cat rules take precedence
risks: Firefly API load when computing per-account history on every webhook
Review queue backlog if operator does not clear panel
